concerns.text: T024 'Validate algorithm implementation against KnotInfo reference values (per FR-003)' is unexecutable in Phase 1. FR-003 explicitly states 'Additional invariants MUST NOT be computed in Phase 1' and 'Core invariants are tabulated from Knot Atlas, not computed, so algorithm validation applies only to additional invariants.' Task references algorithm validation with no applicable target in Phase 1 scope.

T028 'implement validation script (per FR-011, SC-007)' does not specify file location. SC-007 requires validation script in docs/reproducibility/ but task only mentions documenting rules. Implementer lacks target path for script (e.g., docs/reproducibility/validate_tie_breaking.py).

T038 'Create combined complexity metric visualization' references undefined artifact. spec.md FR-005/FR-006 only define crossing number, braid index, hyperbolic volume as core invariants. No specification exists for how to combine metrics or weight them. Task not executable without spec clarification.

T039 'Document interpretation of combined metric' depends on T038's undefined combined metric. Cannot execute without specification of what metric is being interpreted. Cascading dependency on unexecutable T038.

T057 'Documentation updates in docs/reproducibility/ (ensure all 11+ files present)' is too coarse. Does not specify which files need updates, what updates are needed, or verification criteria. Atomizer will need to split into file-specific tasks.

T058 'Code cleanup and refactoring in code/' is not executable. No specific code areas, refactor types, or acceptance criteria defined. Implementer cannot deterministically execute without clarification.

T059 'Run quickstart.md validation' references quickstart.md which is not in plan.md project structure. Task assumes artifact existence without specification. Not executable until quickstart.md is created or task removed.

T060 'Additional unit tests in tests/unit/ (test_downloader.py, test_parser.py)' is too vague. 'Additional' implies existing tests but no baseline specified. Does not define what test cases to cover or verification criteria.
